title: The Dodder Bank (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
When no flower is nigh, you might
        Spy a weed with deep delight;
        So, when far from saints and bliss,
        God might give a sin a kiss.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Stephens delivers a powerful performance in "The Dodder Bank (The Rocky Road To Dublin)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
